title: Tangy Fluffy Mexican Prawns Bowl
description: A midnight‑craving keto bowl featuring tangy lime, fluffy coconut cream, and spicy bhuna‑seasoned prawns atop cauliflower rice.

ingredients.name: Raw frozen prawns, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: Thaw in cold water for 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Bhuna spice mix
ingredients.amount: 3 teaspoons (1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp coriander, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp garam masala, 1/2 tsp chili powder, 1/2 tsp salt, 1/4 tsp pepper)

instructions: Thaw the prawns in cold water for 30 minutes, then pat dry.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; add the bhuna spice mix and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the prawns to the skillet and cook for 2–3 minutes per side, or until they turn opaque; remove from heat.
In the same skillet, add the cauliflower rice and stir‑fry for 3–4 minutes until tender.
In a bowl, layer cauliflower rice as the base, then top with prawns, avocado slices, shredded cheese, and chopped cilantro.
Drizzle the lime juice and keto‑friendly mayo over the bowl.
Whisk the coconut cream until fluffy and spoon it over the bowl for a light, airy finish.
Garnish with extra cilantro and serve immediately.
